title: The right fit
body: The representative that I was placed in contact with, understood my needs and was able to come up with a more than fair solution for me and my family. I love the idea of the vibration to wake up, but we are a very heavy sleeping bunch, so the standard version did not get us moving in the morning. We will be trying the pro version and feel that it will be a much better fit for us and appreciate FitSleeps working with us to get the "right fit" :)

title: Reliable, comfortable, easy to use
body:
The fitsleeps silent alarm does exactly what I need! It's beyond easy to use, is completely reliable, and has a rather long battery life, although I've never reached the end, lol. It's surprisingly comfortable; I barely notice I'm wearing it. The design is innovative and does not feel cheaply made.

Support is very responsive as well. Solid product, solid company!

I’ve had mornings where the initial lite vibration is enough..but other mornings where the vibration needed to crank a little more to get me awake. I have tested the highest level of vibration just to see what that feels like..and it’s intense enough to wake anybody.  I really appreciate using the FitSleeps wristband for my new morning routine..and the critical part..waking me up!!

I was asked to send a photo of everything I received and he tried to tell me I received everything I ordered. I didn't. Then he tried to tell me the notation on the boxes were proof that they were waterproofed. There is zero notation on either box.I had to ask three times to be able to return them. They are currently attempting to get me to keep them and they'll refund me 50%. Now they want to charge me $20 to return them. This company is a complete fraud.

title: Frequently falls off, doesn’t consistently wake me up
body:
Read the reviews and everything the product was supposed to deliver, but very underwhelmed.  

I bought the pro version, spent over $100 on the item + shipping.  

Because FitSleeps advertised enhanced vibration features for heavy sleepers, I opted for that.   It’s been over a month and the experience has not been great.

1) about 40% of the time, the device falls off my wrist in the middle of the night because it only has 2 snaps, and no loop to hold the band in place (unlike an Apple Watch). 

2) changing alarm times is difficult, this product doesn’t blue tooth to a phone, so it’s like 1985 trying to set the clock on your Casio digital wrist watch.  Accidentally press the minute button 1 too many times, you have the press is 58 more times to get back to the time you intended.

3) the remaining 60% of the time the device doesn’t fall off middle of the night, it’s hit & miss when the device actually wakes me up. I’m a heavy sleeper, so not good for me.

For $100, I expected more.  In hindsight, I should have stuck to my Apple Watch, as this FitSleeps pro device doesn’t vibrate any harder than  it does.

If you already have a smart watch, don’t buy this.  If you’re a light sleeper, this might work better.
company_reply:
Hi, thanks for taking the time to share such detailed feedback, we’re really sorry to hear about your experience and we understand your frustration. 

We'd like to fully acknowledge your concerns about the product. We 've been receiving the same feedback about the strap falling off that's why we developed a new strap with a metal buckle closure for a more secure fit. 

We’d genuinely like to look into your specific case and see how we can improve this experience for you. Could you please reach out to us directly at thomas@fitsleeps.com
 with your order details? That way we can review everything properly and help as quickly as possible.

title: Update 2/20/2026
body:
Update of my review.
As you can tell by my original review (1 star), I was not happy.  This update is for 3 stars. The customer service, LUKAS, stepped in and we had several emails with him trying to "make it right".  I ended up getting the Pro Version. Again LUKAS gets 5 star service, but the product needs some more fine tuning.  You have to have a lot of patience with this wrist alarm.  First of all, it takes at least 2 weeks to get an order, then trying to program it is so frustrating! Only one tiny button to scroll through several screens, no backward, video of instructions is useless.  After so many attempts and LUKAS' help, I have finally got it programmed.  The alarm did wake me.  The alarm will go off everyday unless I cancel it. Didn't like that. The "new" wrist band still needs some work.  It's the old style watch clip band and looks "cheap" and is bulky.  I would need to cut it because it's very long.  The wrist band order does not include the charger.  If you need to return the item, its very costly to the Netherlands.  They say they are working on a US return site.  
This company is trying to make it right but I can't recommend their product. Sorry.
-----------------------------------------------------


I ordered the standard Fitsleeps wake up alarm 12/26/25 by the recommendation of my 22yo grandson. I did not check the reviews, big mistake.  I received confirmation of my order and was told I would get notice of shipping.  I realize this was holiday time so I wasn't too concerned at first but by Jan 5th I started emailing on my order status. Just kept getting "on its way". I was ready to report to my bank but then Jan 13th I received it.  I had difficulty with setting the time let alone the alarm. Not user friendly.  I took to my grandson and after awhile he was able to scroll through screens.  I gave it another try but no luck PLUS the wristband is poorly designed. I could not secure it close and the vibration was too weak. I was very unhappy and proceeded to get my money back.  I contacted customer support and got a response of suggestions I might try OR I could use an ALTERNATIVE OFFER OF 50% cash back, $15 voucher and keep the product for regifting to save me the hassle of returning.  At first I said no, just return money back.  So I was given a link to follow instructions of how to return. Then I thought "where am I returning this product because it sounded like it was international"  and I can see from other reviews that I looked at after purchase that yes, you are returning to the Netherlands!  Well that would be more than 50% cash back offered.  So I just did the ALTERNATIVE OFFER and thought that was better than nothing.  In all my questions back and forth with customer service (Lukas) it was a pleasant experience. I give him 5 STARS.  He even offered to let me know when the new wristband was available (1-2 weeks).  I hope he can send that to me with "no charge"  we will see.  I used my $15 voucher to purchase the charger which I will give to my grandson.  I give the product a 0 and the customer service a 5.

Please know that your feedback is what keeps our company going as we genuinely strive to improve our products and customer experience over time. Hearing directly from customers like you helps us identify what needs to change and where we can do better. 

- The FitSleeps Team

title: Charger not included
body: While this is a nice product, it’s misleading on the website when the chargers are advertised as ‘popular’ add on products, when they are actually a REQUIREMENT since they are not included with the band. In the several display slides, it’s not mentioned either - you have to go to the FAQ page to find out you need to buy the charger separately or, like in my case, only discover that fact once you receive the product & then have to pay another postage charge. I understand that they are 3 different types of chargers, but that’s another reason that they look like they’re optional. With the abundance of displayed information on these bands, it should be made clear that the charger is a seperate purchase & not display them as a ‘popular’ add on with the other accessories like they are optional - hiding that important information on the FAQ page is dodgy. Even on the special pricing, they are not cheap & for that amount I would expect - well, I did expect - a charger would be included. Set the purchase screen so that when a band is selected, there is a drop down list of the charger options to add to the order as a requirement, so that the buyer is aware they must add it to the order if they wish to charge their band. Simple oversight in website design or deliberate misleading…? I’m not sure… but either way, do better.
company_reply:
Hi Lisa, thanks a lot for sharing your experience with feedback. We are aware more customers run into this issue and working on a development in website and catalog to showcase this in a better way. We do sell it separate, because lots of customers of us already have a low voltage USB charging head at home, so they don't need ours. 

Thanks again and we take this very serious and working on it!

title: SCAM
body:
Several companies sell this watch, with Fit Sleep probably being the most well-known, priced around $100. However, you can find the exact same watch on Walmart’s website for just $16. It’s identical, lightweight plastic, same design. I encourage anyone curious to go to walmart.com and type “Fitsleeps” in the search bar, you’ll see all the options, ranging from $9 to $18.

These watches are all made in China, and it seems these companies purchase them in bulk from the same manufacturers, then resell them for $100 each. The watch works well, but it’s definitely not worth that price. Again, I got mine for $16.

I’m hoping someone creates a video exposing them and showing how this market works. I get it if they’re selling it for maybe $30 or even $40, but $100 is a straight up scam. I encourage anyone to do some basic research online. Unfortunately, I’m not a content creator, but one of them could easily make a short video, or even a mini documentary exposing this scheme. I bet it would get a ton of views..
company_reply:
Hi! Thanks for bringing this to our attention. While some products may look identical on the outside, there are significant differences in the technology and hardware we use.

Our FitSleeps Pro features proprietary automatic increasing vibration intensity—a unique technology designed for wake-up optimization that is not available in the budget models you mentioned. To support this, our Pro model is equipped with a high-performance motor capable of much stronger vibrations and longer durations without compromising the device's lifespan.

Additionally, our price reflects higher standards in battery safety, industrial-grade internal sensors, and premium build quality. We are currently taking action against unauthorized sellers using our brand assets to mislead customers. To ensure you receive a certified, safe product with a full warranty and our unique vibration tech, we always recommend buying directly from fitsleeps.com.

title: Arrived broken/uncharged. No charger included.
body:
I recently purchased a standard fitsleeps bracelet and am now looking to return it due to some immediately concerning issues. First, it was unclear that a special charger is needed for the bracelet. As soon as I realized this, I went and ordered a charger. Second, after attempting to set up the clock and alarm functions, the device turned off and will not respond to any button pushes. I am not sure if it won’t turn on because of it not being charged, or if it’s broken, and without a charger in hand I have no way to confirm which is the issue (and I do not own a compatible charger).

I was hoping to at least try out the alarm while I waited for the charger to arrive, optimistically thinking that the device arrived fully charged (which should last 14 days). After my frustration with setting up the device and not even being able to use it once… I would just like to return the bracelet and cancel my order for the charger to get a full refund.

UPDATE: Fitsleeps did reach out to me after posting this review to make things right, and offered to give me a charger for free so that I could actually try the product before sending it back for a refund. I will continue to update this review once I have charged and used the product.

UPDATE 2: after trying the product I will say that it works. I have slept through the alarm a couple times, though, so I do wish it was a bit stronger. I will change my review to 4 stars because of the responsiveness of Fitsleeps and because the product does work as advertised. My biggest issues with it are the single button configuration being very annoying to use, and not being able to adjust the brightness of the light and the strength of the vibration. I know the advanced model does have adjustable intensity but I don’t know if the price is justifiable solely for that function.
company_reply:
Hi Sean, thanks for the feedback. No charger is added because you can charge with any USB adapter that has low voltage at home. It is something to review internally and I will check in if we can change this. 

I emailed you today and hope we can solve it shortly with you, since we don't want our customers to have an experience like that. We would love you to be able to try our product

title: Ordered 39 Days Ago...Still Waiting.
body:
Updated below (1/12/26)

Ordered December 4th. Got a "pre-shipping tracking number" on Dec 7th. That's the last update to tracking. They say "they've investigated," "must be a problem," "it's in customs," but each response feels like BS and the runaround. I have asked repeatedly for the international shipping info and they don't respond.

I have a theory that either they're unable to keep up and just make up the shipping issues crap to cover their butts, or they're crooks. I'd be less inclined to think they're crooks if they were more forthright with communication/info. Maybe they're living it up on all the income they've garnered over the holidays, content to let their "customers" rot in waiting.

UPDATE:

January 12, 2026 - Still waiting. No update to tracking. Still the exact same "explanations." I have emailed back and forth with the the company over a dozen times. I email customer service (Lukas) and cc. Thomas on every email and the replies are all the same non-info info. They're "investigating," "delays for the holidays," "shipping partners" blah blah.

I have now requested a refund. It's clear that their shipping policy isn't accurate. The product itself may be fine, but I don't think I'll ever find out. I just want a refund now so I can move on from this company and be done with it.
company_reply: Hi! Truly sorry to read through the experience we got. We do have some delays, and also with the tracking having delays. Sometimes we can check with our partner what the status is, so we do see its on the move while for you it looks like its not moving. Happy to explain further and solve it for you, since we want a good experience for every customer. Could you please email thomas@fitsleeps.com. Happy to help. Please email us!

title: Buyer beware
body: Buyer beware!  The claim on the website is "100 day trial- love it or your money back" but that's not true.  I worked with customer service to let them know that I was not happy with the product and it took 4 attempts for them to finally let me know that I was allowed to send it back to the address in the Netherlands.  They do not provide return labels.  Cost to send it back from Phoenix, AZ to the Netherlands is $60 and the product cost $100. DO NOT waste your money by buying this product.  No such thing as the money back guarantee.

title: The best thing to happen to my mornings!
body:
So, in Portugal, where I’m from, we usually start work or even school around either 8 or 9 am! That means that we have to wake up way before that so that can commute to the places we work!
It’s a relief to know that are brands like Fitsleeps that care about the ones like me that are very hard sleepers! Before I had my fitsleeps alarm, I had *33* alarms! And still, there would be times that I wouldn’t wake up, and be late!
No to mention the headaches I had because of the sound of 33 alarms 5 days a week, and suffering from migraines, that was really painful right at the start of the day!
With my fitsleeps alarm, I started waking up on time, no headaches, no migraines anymore, just the vibration alone was enough to make me jump out of bed and start my day! 

I really recommend fitsleeps to anyone who is a hard sleeper or that likes to wake up without the sound of alarms, but still has to wake up early!

There was a me before fitsleeps, and a better one after!

I advise you to get yours now, it’s a really great product! I love mine!

Bernardo Pires😀
company_reply: Hi Bernardo, thank you so much for your amazing review! We're thrilled to hear how FitSleeps has transformed your mornings and helped you wake up on time without the headaches. Your story truly means a lot to us!

title: Do your research and ask questions
body: At first glance, when I saw this product on Instagram, I was a bit skeptical because the majority of ads on Instagram seem to display these amazing products that are too good to be true, but with all the research and reviews I've done on this product, it seemed viable to purchase. To be honest, it did take a little bit to deliver, but that's understandable due to it being from another country, and maybe they deal with different shipment details just like any other company. I do agree with the standard version being a bit messy to set up, but if you figure out how to set it up, you can just leave it alone and never have to touch the settings ever again. All products are going to be made differently and not tailored to personal expectations. It took me less than 5 to 10 minutes to set up the watch itself, and so far, I haven't messed with it, and the alarm itself is great. I don't have to use my iPhone's radar alarm anymore to wake me or anyone else up anxiously, and with this alarm, I can wake myself up calmly without bothering anyone else. From the first time I used the alarm until now, it has woken me up each time without fail, and only using the 1st alarm, I don't have a 2nd or 3rd alarm set. One key principle that makes a product great is its customer service, and Fitsleep is exceptional. With every review I've read so far, from being 1 star to 5 stars, the company has replied to try and provide, to their best ability, the best possible solution and experience for the customer.
company_reply:
Hey, this truly brings a smile to my face! Thank you for taking the time to share such an honest and thoughtful review. I am glad the wristband works so well for you and that you’re waking up calmly without disturbing anyone. It also means a lot that you noticed our customer service. We always try to give every customer the best experience possible. If you ever run into any questions, don't hesitate to reach out! :) 

Thomas

body:

Also, website is really unclear on features (I think it tracks my steps, estimates my calories and estimates how far I’ve walked … but it’s really not clear from the website user instructions. Another thing - you don’t need a special charger: it just plugs into a normal usb charger plug. And last thing - I have no idea if it is waterproof or just “a bit water resistant” having paid for the waterproofing upgrade. 

All that said, I only want this product for the alarm that won’t wake my wife at 4:30am. This serves that function really well. The controls are a bit fiddly, and it is hard to adjust the alarms (e.g. if my daughter wakes up in the night and I want to push back my wake up time by 45 min - that will take a lot of concentration and fiddling, and will probably keep me up for a while.

For the rest is the waterproof version splash waterproof, which means its shower & sweat resistant, which is also mentioned on the product page of it. :)

Thomas

title: I rarely leave negative reviews, but…
body:
I rarely leave negative reviews, and have never in my life left a negative review before receiving a product. However, fitsleeps is the exception. This has been, without a doubt, one of the most infuriating customer experiences of my life, and that’s coming from someone who works in customer service. 

I placed my order on September 30th and it still hasn’t even shipped out. For reference I am writing this review at 8pm on October 10th. I’ll let you do the math on how many days that is. The tracking information says a label was created on the 8th, but it hasn’t moved in 48 hours. 

Additionally, their processing window is supposed to be 1-3 days. When I reached out inquiring about this I received an email back assuring me my order was ready for shipment, and a reminder of their processing window, which was extra frustrating. I know the processing window, I am reaching out to you because we are now at DOUBLE the time of the maximum processing time, and you see fit to hit me with the “remember it takes one to three days for processing” on DAY 6. 


Also, an important factor in this is the only shipping option they offer is “express” which costs $5 and they do not disclose that until checkout. This is annoying enough, but what part about this process is “express” to you? 

All of this after I had issues with my order in the first place has left me, to be blunt, pissed off. If I had ordered this for myself I would have canceled this order a million times over, but it’s for my husband. All I can say at this point is it doesn’t matter how good or bad the product itself is, I will never, ever order from fitsleeps again. And if I do not have my order by next Wednesday, I will be looking into filing a complaint with the BBB and possibly a chargeback with my bank. 

I truly can’t express how stupidly infuriating this process has been
company_reply:
Hey Megan,

We’re really sorry for the delay with your order. There was an issue on our end that caused it to take longer than expected. We see that we’ve responded to you quickly every time, and we’re doing everything we can to help you.

If you have any further questions or concerns, feel free to reach out to us via our support email at support@fitsleeps.com

We truly appreciate your feedback, and we’ll continue to work on improving our service.

Best regards,
Lukas
FitSleeps

body:
Seriously overpriced product, especially the Pro version. Yes, it does what it promises — waking you up more gently yet firmly — but it is a mess to set up. I can’t wrap my head around the fact that there is no simple alarm on/off function. This means that if you want to sleep longer (e.g. on a Sunday) you have to press the button about 17 times until it says ‘alarm off’; and to wake up early on Monday you have to set the alarm all over again (takes another 6 pushes or so).

I also don’t appreciate the fact that they don’t include a charger and make you pay extra for that. It seems to fit into a regular USB charger, even though the plug doesn’t look like USB — another weird choice by the designers, and a pity it’s not USB-C like most modern products on the market.

We purchased this for my daughter who is a heavy sleeper and she has slept through it five straight mornings without even realizing that it went off. The hoops you have to go through to program it with only one button are silly. Simply turning off an alarm for one day, requires up to 20 button pushes (go to 6 AM alarm and then hit the button 18 times...one for each hour... until you reach "off").

On their website, they advertise 100% guarantee and they do make it clear that you have to ship it back on your own cost. However, what they don't tell you, is that you have to ship it back to the Netherlands. The cost and hassle to ship this back are more than the price of the product.

title: A not so silent and not so reliable alarm clock
body:
I’ve been using FitSleep Pro for a month now. Here's whats good and whats bad:

Positive:

- Battery life is extremely long.
- Noticeable improvement in sleep. It also helped me significantly reduce phone/tech use in bed or before sleep.

Negative:

– No option to set alarms for specific weekdays; they’re either on or off every day. Every Friday I have to turn them off for the weekend, and every Sunday I have to set them up again.
– Only one button for all controls. Turning an alarm on or off takes around 20+ presses - very tedious. This is on the "Pro" version; I can’t imagine how bad it was before but its still very bad. 20+ button presses to turn on or off an alarm? Come on ...
– Vibration starts low but jumps to maximum within seconds. On high, it’s extremely loud - so loud my partner always wakes up. This is not a silent alarm clock.
– The rubber armband feels uncomfortable and causes skin irritation.
– The armband clasp is held by two small bolts that come off easily. As a stomach sleeper who keeps my hands under the pillow, the band often catches when I move my hands, and it has fallen off several times during sleep - unacceptable if you rely on it to wake you.
– The vibrating unit feels bulky and cheap. I wish it were flatter, like a Whoop band.

Considering the very high price (€80), here's my harsh verdict:
– Rubber band comes off easily and feels unpleasant on skin.
– Menu navigation is awful - 20+ clicks to set an alarm.
– No option to configure alarms for specific days of the week only.
– Not silent at all; the motor is cheap and VERY loud and noticeable in a quiet room.
– Not reliable. It ramps from low to max vibration in about 10 seconds, then stops completely, giving you a very short window to wake up. Works in light sleep, fails in deep sleep.

Overall: I like it and will keep using it, but I wouldn’t buy it again at this price in its current state. It feels more like a prototype than a finished product and needs several design iterations.

I wanted a reliable (!) + silent alarm clock, but in its current state, it fails to deliver on both promises .
company_reply:
Hi Nico,

Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed review of your experience with FitSleep Pro. We’re glad to hear you’ve noticed a positive impact on your sleep and phone use before bed.

Thanks for your detailed feedback. We really appreciate it. We designed the band to be smooth and comfortable for most users, and many tell us they barely feel it while sleeping. The vibration currently increases in 3 automatic intensities over ~70 seconds, and our tests show it works well for over 98% of heavy sleepers. Fun fact lower than 1% return our products.

That said, we know everyone’s sleep habits are different. We’re already working on a new version with a different strap for “wild sleepers” and an even stronger vibration that ends with a light shock for the heaviest sleepers.

Your input helps us keep improving. Thank you again for sharing your experience. If you'd like to dive deeper in it with us we are always open to talk with our customers about improvements. You can always text us on whatsapp or send  an email to support@fitsleeps.com 

Best regards,
Lukas

title: Produkt nicht zufriedenstellend, Rückgabe furchtbar!
body:
Leider ist das Produkt und vorallem der Kunden-Support nicht gut.
Hatte die Uhr nach mehrmaligen Rückfragen und Klärungen zurück schicken wollen, weil es einfach nicht benutzerfreundlich in der Handhabung ist. Man kann keine Wecker auf bestimmte Wochentage stellen und auch das an und ausschalten des Weckers, ist mit zig Knopfdrücken verbunden. Hinzukommt, dass sich Software nicht die Einstellung des vorher eingestellten Weckers merkt und man somit jedes Mal neu den Wecker einstellen muss…. furchtbar nervig und zeitaufwendig. 
Das größte Problem ist aber die Rückabwickelung vom Kaufprozess!!!!! Man muss regelrecht „betteln“ die Rücksendung zu bestätigen und dann auch noch die Kosten dafür selbst tragen (zudem sehr hoch und fragwürdig). Ich habe bis heute immer noch nicht die Erstattung (via Paypal) erhalten und die Rücksendung ist schon mehr als 2 Wochen beim Verkäufer eingegangen. Auf Emails, wird nur um Entschuldigung gebeten aber ausgezahlt wird dennoch nichts! Unglaublich unseriös und kundenunfreundlich. 
Wer hier bestellt, sollte sich das seeeehr gut überlegen oder besser sein lassen. Solle die Erstattung bis morgen nicht veranlasst sein, werde ich ein Konflikt bei Paypal eröffnen und weitere Schritte gehen!
company_reply:
Hallo,

es tut uns sehr leid, von Ihrer Erfahrung zu hören und dass Sie so frustriert sind. Das ist absolut nicht die Erfahrung, die wir unseren Kundinnen und Kunden bieten möchten.

Wir haben Ihnen bereits eine E-Mail zu diesem Anliegen geschickt, damit wir Ihre Rücksendung und Erstattung prüfen und so schnell wie möglich klären können. Bitte schauen Sie in Ihrem Posteingang nach (auch im Spam-Ordner, falls nötig) und antworten Sie uns dort, damit wir Ihnen direkt weiterhelfen können.

Vielen Dank, dass Sie uns darauf aufmerksam gemacht haben, wir schätzen die Möglichkeit sehr, das für Sie in Ordnung zu bringen.

title: teleurstellend
body:
Dit bedrijf beweert binnen enkele dagen te leveren (vanuit Nederland naar België), maar mijn bestelling deed er uiteindelijk drie weken over. De verpakking was goedkoop en slordig, alleen het doosje van de horloge zag er degelijk uit.

De advertenties op sociale media ogen vreemd en onprofessioneel. Voor mij voelde het allemaal erg onbetrouwbaar, bijna alsof het om een scam gaat.

Na het testen van het product ben ik helaas teleurgesteld. De vibratie werkt goed en maakt me effectief wakker, maar het bandje zit slecht, is lastig om aan te doen en schiet soms los tijdens het slapen, waardoor het zijn functie verliest. Ik had de “Pro”-editie besteld, maar die voelt allesbehalve professioneel aan.

Daarnaast vind ik hun verkooppraktijken misleidend. Op de website staat niet duidelijk vermeld dat je helemaal geen extra adapter hoeft te kopen als je al een USB-oplader hebt. Dat lijkt een makkelijke, maar oneerlijke upsell.

De grootste teleurstelling: ik vond exact hetzelfde product op AliExpress voor slechts €3 – 100% identiek. Ik heb mijn bestelling niet teruggestuurd omdat ik er geen vertrouwen in had dat ik mijn geld ooit zou terugzien.

Nogmaals: ik heb geen probleem met dropshipping, maar wees eerlijk tegenover je klanten. Met deze review wil ik anderen waarschuwen voordat ze hier bestellen.
company_reply:
Beste, 

Jammer om te horen dat je ontevreden bent, zeker omdat we geen enkel bericht van jou bij onze klantenservice hebben ontvangen. Als je namelijk ontevreden bent, kan je gemakkelijk je bestelling retourneren.

Wat betreft je opmerkingen: het is begrijpelijk dat je online producten vergelijkt. Dat er op AliExpress producten staan die qua uiterlijk lijken, betekent echter niet dat ons product hetzelfde is of dat wij dropshippers zijn. Je ziet daar bijvoorbeeld ook "Nike"-producten, maar dat maakt Nike zelf natuurlijk geen dropshipper, toch?  Het kunnen ook imitaties of copycats zijn. 

We zijn een jong bedrijf dat veel investeert in de ontwikkeling en verbetering van onze producten en service. Kritiek mag, maar het helpt ons en toekomstige klanten meer als je ons eerst de kans geeft om een oplossing te bieden in plaats van direct een negatieve review te plaatsen.

We nodigen je alsnog uit om contact met ons op te nemen, zodat we dit netjes kunnen afhandelen.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Het FitSleeps Team

Thomas

title: Kein Antwort mehr bei Rücksendung
body:
Ich habe dort nach einer Rücksendung angefragt, da ich von dem Wecker nicht wach wurde und es ja die 100 Tage Garantie gibt. Mir wurde als Rücksendeadresse eine Adresse in Holland genannt.
Die Kosten dorthin muss ich selber tragen (14,00€).
Das Paket wurde zugestellt, und jetzt bekomme ich keine Reaktion mehr auf meine Emails bzw. auf meine Rücksendung.
Ich warte jetzt noch 2 Tage, danach muss man Vielleicht über Rechtliche Schritte nachdenken.
Wirklich nicht zu empfehlen.


Nachtrag 21.08.2025
Habe jetzt über Klarna einen Stop der Zahlung eingeleitet und um Klärung des Problems gebeten.
Mal schauen ob so eine Antwort kommt.

Nachtrag 26.08.2025
Heute wurde endlich mal auf meine Emails geantwortet und endlich meine Retoure bearbeitet.
Werde dort nicht mehr bestellen, alles sehr mit vorsichtig zu genießen.
company_reply:
Es tut uns sehr leid zu hören, dass Sie diese Erfahrung gemacht haben. Normalerweise werden Rücksendungen bei uns innerhalb von 5 Werktagen nach Eingang bearbeitet. Daher möchten wir gerne prüfen, ob Ihr Paket bereits bei uns angekommen ist und ob uns das Tracking vorliegt.

Wir reagieren in der Regel immer innerhalb von 24 Stunden auf E-Mails – daher tut es uns leid, wenn Ihre Nachricht dazwischen durchgerutscht ist. Damit wir das schnellstmöglich für Sie klären können, würden wir Sie bitten, uns noch einmal direkt an support@fitsleeps.com
 zu schreiben und das Tracking beizulegen. Dann können wir Ihr Anliegen sofort prüfen und eine schnelle Lösung für Sie finden.

Vielen Dank für Ihre Geduld, wir kümmern uns darum! 🙏

title: Nicht zufrieden.
body:
Absolut Nicht zufrieden.

Schlechte Qualität und billig gemacht, verliere die Uhr ständig in der Nacht.
Ich stehe nicht auf.
Sehr umständlich zum wecker ein und aus stellen man muss immer 24klicks durchklicken um ein oder ausschalten,
Absolut mühsam.

Die Uhr ist von einem anderen China Produzent. Verpackung war auch sehr minderwertig.

Preis Leistung stimmt überhaupt nicht meiner Meinung. Da gibt es definitiv besseres auf dem markt. 

Ich verstehe langsam dass ihr keine negative Bewertung habt und so alle täuscht ihr lässt die schlechten Kommentaren immer wieder löschen!
Ihr seid die, die leute täuschen wegen allen den ganzen guten bewertungen.
Es wird nicht lange gehen bis mein kommentar gelöscht wird aber von so leuten wie euch sollte gewarnt werden und trustpilot soll aufhören die schlechten bewertungen zu Löschen!
company_reply:

Lukas

title: Dropshipping onzin.
body:
Zag de advertentie op Instagram, dacht top dit moet ik hebben. 
Na het bestellen kon mijn pakketje niet getracked worden met het europese trackingnummer. 
Blijkt dus dat het direct uit China gedropshipped wordt.
Kostenpunt bij fitsleeps 65Eur.
Kostenpunt direct: 12Eur. Apparaat werkt amper, Ziet er niet uit zoals op de advertentie en is gewoon goedkope meuk.

Er in getrapt, maar jullie gaan 'm terug nemen. Hoe jammer je het ook vindt dat ik direct naar trustpilot ga, ik ga m'n tijd niet verspillen met Noan en Britten.

Edit: Mooie template voor een reactie.
Maar jullie gaan dus niet inhoudelijk in op mijn review.
Prima. Dan gaat er een mail naar het consumentenrecht, want jullie geven niet duidelijk aan wie voor productie en retouren verantwoordelijk zijn. 

Buiten om het feit dat jullie dus gewoon keihard liegen. Het product kwam per direct uit china.
Het productie bedrijf heet Lebexy Het modelnummer is T5C. Hier de tracking link van 17track met mijn following number: 17track(punt)net/?nums=YT2504521266028160

houdoe
company_reply:
Hi Thorn, Jammer om te horen dat je deze conclusie trekt. We begrijpen je frustratie en willen graag verduidelijken wat er is gebeurd. Recent zijn we verhuisd van ons warehouse in Nederland naar een internationale locatie om onze producten wereldwijd beschikbaar te maken. Hierdoor is de verzending van 1-2 dagen naar 3-5 dagen gegaan. 

Het is jammer dat je ons niet eens de mogelijkheid geeft om het op te lossen en direct een negatieve review plaatst, wat veel impact heeft op ons imago. Het schetst niet alleen een verkeerd beeld, maar ook schrikt het anderen die veel baat kunnen hebben bij ons product af. Het product is volledig doorontwikkeld in Nederland en aangepast naar de behoeften van de klant.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Bob - Fitsleeps

title: Mooi design bandje
body:
Mooi design bandje, wat doet wat het moet. Wekken of jezelf reminderen op bepaalde uren dat er iets moet gebeuren.

Goede service van het bedrijf ook, komt betrouwbaar op mij over.

De instellingen zouden iets makkelijker mogen zijn wat betreft het instellen van meerdere wekkers en de tijd et cetera, maar na een tijdje weet je hoe het apparaatje werkt.

Fijn om te lezen dat je tevreden bent over het product en onze service!

title: Diepe slaper
body: Ik ben echt een diepe slaper en werd vaak niet wakker van mijn telefoonwekker. Daarom gebruikte ik een analoge wekker die superluid is, tot ergernis van iedereen in huis. Toen probeerde ik dit wekbandje. In het begin gebruikte ik het samen met mijn analoge wekker, maar na een week durfde ik het alleen met het bandje te proberen. En het werkt! Het maakt me rustig wakker, zonder herrie, en ik kan mijn dag relaxed beginnen. Ik was eerst best sceptisch, maar dit bandje is het echt helemaal waard! Ik vond het zelfs zo goed dat ik er nog eentje gekocht heb voor mijn vriendin, en ook zij is supertevreden.

title: HAPPY met m'n fitsleeper
body: Ik ben slechthorend en toen ik de fitsleeper voorbij zag komen werd ik eigenlijk gelijk al happy.  Als ik naar een hotel ging of een belangrijke afspraak had kreeg ik bij voorbaat al stress..... kon ik op tijd wakker zijn. Ik had wel iets voor onder m'n kussen dat trillingen afgaf maar daar sliep ik soms door heen. En toen kreeg ik de fitsleeper!!!! Een wereld van verschil: relaxed en rustig wakker worden. Ik ga met een fijn gevoel slapen want ik weet nu dat ik wakker word van de fitsleeper.......VERY HAPPY💖
company_reply:
Wat fijn om te lezen, dankjewel!

Het maakt ons super blij om te lezen dat het zo'n verschil maakt en je met een gerust hart kunt slapen én op tijd wakker wordt. Heel fijn dat je er zo happy mee bent! 

Groet,
Team Fitsleeps

title: Waardeloos
body: gekocht voor mijn man. Het apparaatje zelf ziet er leuk uit, maar schiet continu los. Mijn man wordt er ook niet wakker van en is 3 keer te laat gekomen in 1 week. Het “alarm” is gewoon een trillende armband om je pols. Niks meer en niks minder. Voor €60 zou ik het laten en gewoon een normale wekker kopen. Dit is echt vreselijk commercieel en doet totaal niet wat het beloofd.
company_reply:
Hi Marieke,

Wat vervelend om te lezen dat het bandje niet effectief is voor je partner. Klanttevredenheid staat bij ons voorop, en daarom bieden we ook altijd 30 dagen proefslapen aan. Ik heb je gegevens helaas niet kunnen vinden in ons systeem. Zou je contact met mij op willen nemen via info@fitsleeps.com of +31 6 27504388? Ik kijk graag met je mee naar een passende oplossing.

Bedankt voor je eerlijke feedback.

Noan
Groet,
Team Fitsleeps

De trilling is echt perfect voelbaar, precies sterk genoeg om me wakker te krijgen, maar zacht genoeg om mijn partner niet te storen! Zo word ik eindelijk wakker zonder een luidruchtige wekker en ik merk dat ik me daardoor de hele dag energieker voel :). title: Perfect voor diepe slapers. Goede service
body: Ideaal! Het bandje van fitsleeps maakt mij beter wakker dan mij wekker. Ik raad het iedereen aan die moeilijk wakker te krijgen is. Pakketje was kwijt bij de pakketdienst, de medewerkers hebben mij zeer netjes geholpen en direct een nieuwe verstuurd. Ik ga er nog een bestellen voor mijn vader!

title: Aanrader
body: Na een tijd van slecht slapen en moeilijk wakker worden door mijn telefoonwekker, kreeg ik FitSleeps als aanrader. Wist niet zeker of het wel mijn ding zou zijn, maar uiteindelijk toch een kans gegeven. Ben daar heel blij mee! Het werkt namelijk super, zit goed om de pols en wat ik vooral belangrijk vind is dat het ook nog eens kwaliteit is. :)

title: ideale wekker voor een gezin
body: Als vader van mij gezin met een baby van nu 10 maanden die snel wakker wordt van een wekker is dit echt de perfecte oplossing. Nu wordt alleen ik op een hele rustige vriendelijke manier wakker vrouw en dochter slapen rustig  verder en iedereen is uitgeruster en fitter wakker. Kortom op een echte aanrader

body: Uitstekend product ideaal voor mensen die moeilijk wakker worden en niet van Een zeikende wekker houden. enorm blij met het product 10/10

title: Aanrader
body: Ik gebruik het wekkerbandje van Fitsleeps nu al 2 maanden en ik ben er echt over te spreken. Ik gebruik sindsdien ook niet meer de wekker van mijn telefoon! Ik merk dat ik hierdoor beter en lekkerder van wakker wordt

title: Geen telefoon meer in de slaapkamer
body: Ik was al een tijdje opzoek naar een manier om wakker te worden zonder wekker van mijn telefoon. Dit Fitsleep bandje werkt daar perfect voor. Mijn telefoon laat ik in de woonkamer en zorgt ervoor dat ik mijn dag niet start met nieuwsberichten of filmpjes op Tiktok. Ook in de avond merk ik verschil met in slaap komen als ik mijn telefoon niet bij me heb. Een hele dikke plus is ook dat de Fitsleep trilt en dus geen geluid maakt en mijn vriendin niet wakker wordt van mijn wekker.

title: Perfecte Wekker!
body: Ik ben ontzettend blij met de FitSleeps wekker! Mijn vriendin en ik hebben 's ochtends geen ruzie meer omdat zij niet meer wakker wordt gemaakt door mijn wekker. De kwaliteit is top en het zit comfortabel om de pols! Ik zal het bandje aan al mijn vrienden en familie aanraden!

title: Aanrader
body: Ik heb altijd moeite met opstaan en werd vaak chagrijnig wakker. Het was even wennen, maar ik word een stuk rustiger wakker door de Fitsleeper. Ik ben positief verbaasd! Het bandje zit lekker en m’n vriendin is blij dat ze niet meer wakker wordt door het geluid van m’n wekker.

title: Blij met m’n trilbandje
body: Blij met m’n trilbandje. Heerlijk wakker worden! Geen lawaai van de wekker op mijn mobiel.

title: Super ervaring!
body: Ik gebruik sinds kort Fitsleeps en het is een super ervaring om wakker te worden. Ik sta automatisch meteen op, pak niet mijn telefoon, en begin mijn dag.

title: Aanrader!
body:
Sinds kort maak ik gebruik van de Fitsleeper. Ik, en vooral mijn partner, vind het erg fijn dat mijn partner 's ochtends niet wakker wordt van mijn wekker. Ik merk dat ik 's ochtends niet meteen mijn telefoon oppak om mijn wekker uit te zetten en direct al geprikkeld wordt door berichtjes die 's nachts zijn binnengekomen. 

All in all een relaxtere begin van de dag!
